candidates.why: Primary top-line sales figure; clearly labeled and matches total revenue numbers.
Duplicate total of Revenue; kept as fallback in case label changes across years.
Finance income is not operating revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.
Interest income is non-operating, not revenue from primary operations.

candidates.why: Represents net income, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet accrual item, not a revenue line.
Balance sheet accrual item, not a revenue line.
Direct cost associated with production/sales; best representation of COGS.
Likely includes operating staff as well as overhead; better treated as SG&A component than strict COGS.

candidates.why: Explicitly SG&A, not COGS.
Broader operating overhead, not pure direct costs.
Financial, not operating cost of sales.
Non-operating result, not COGS.
Operating overhead, not direct COGS.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not an income statement expense line.
Balance sheet asset, not COGS.
Liability, not COGS.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component (stock-based comp within SG&A).

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Expanded beyond the single SG&A-related candidate to capture main overhead components, per instructions that XSGA_COMPONENTS can include multiple operating expense lines and that candidate list may be incomplete. Selected lines are clearly operating overhead (personnel, other operational expenses, audit and other professional fees, rental/lease costs) and exclude COGS, depreciation, amortization, impairments, interest, and taxes. Please confirm treatment of 'Payroll Expenses' and 'Other operational expenses' as SG&A vs partially production-related, as detailed functional split is not provided. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll Expenses, [Income Statement] Other operational expenses, [Income Statement] Audit Fees, [Income Statement] Audit-Related Fees, [Income Statement] Tax Fees, [Income Statement] Other Fees, [Income Statement] Short-Term Lease Cost, [Income Statement] Rental Expense
No research and development-related line items (R&D, research, development) are present in the provided income statement; treating XRD as zero.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; appears twice in preview but same label; best representation of financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; relevant interest expense subtype.
Represents allocation of profit, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful fallback if primary line missing for some periods.
Balance sheet stock of debt, not an expense flow.
Equity interest, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Multiple interest expense formulations exist; provided as a priority list so downstream processing can take the first non-missing per year.

candidates.row_label: Equity unrecognised in the profit and the loss
candidates.why: Component of OCI-related equity, not total shareholder equity.

candidates.row_label: Other equity unrecognised in the profit and the loss
candidates.why: Component of OCI-related equity, not total shareholder equity.
Total equity, includes any minority interest if present; here matches 'Equity' row but we prefer the more generic 'Equity' label.
Represents total shareholders' equity; appropriate book equity denominator, excluding separate Minority Interest line.

candidates.row_label: Equity unrecognised in the profit and the loss - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing artifact, not total equity.
Balancing line, not the main equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Used the main 'Equity' line, which represents shareholders' equity; a separate 'Minority Interest' line exists (all nan), so Equity is effectively equity attributable to owners.

candidates.why: Generic label but appears unused (all nan); balance sheet provides a clearer Minority Interest line.
Income statement attribution, not the balance sheet equity amount used in BE+MIB denominator.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; correct for MIB even if currently zero.
